item.title: 优步与Motional在拉斯维加斯推出商用机器人出租车服务
item.description: 优步（Uber）与现代汽车（Hyundai Motor）支持的自动驾驶公司Motional于上周五在拉斯维加斯推出了商业化机器人出租车服务。随着这家网约车平台加大力度推进其自动驾驶出租车战略，这已成为一系列类似合作中的最新案例。【原文：Uber and Hyundai Motor-backed autonomous vehicle firm Motional launched a commercial robotaxi service in Las Vegas on Friday, the latest ​in a string of similar tie-ups as the ride-hailing platform ‌doubles down on its self-driving taxi strategy.】

item.title: 随着电动车补贴政策逐渐退场，大众重夺中国汽车销量榜首，比亚迪跌至第四位
item.description: 大众汽车在2026年前两个月重夺全球最大汽车市场中国的主导地位，丰田汽车也同步实现市场份额回升，两者均超越本土电动汽车领军企业比亚迪。此番市场格局变化正值绿色汽车补贴政策逐步退坡之际。【原文：Volkswagen reclaimed car sales dominance in China, the world's largest auto market, in the first two months of 2026 when Toyota ​also regained ground, both overtaking local electric vehicle champion BYD , ‌amid fading subsidies for greener cars.】

item.title: Morning Bid: Markets over a barrel
item.description: 迈克·多兰和ROI团队本周末最期待阅读、观看和收听的内容。【原文：Everything Mike Dolan and the ROI team are excited to read, watch and listen to over the weekend.】

item.title: 星巴克可能忽视劳资纠纷风险，股东代理机构发出警告
item.description: 两家代理咨询公司警告股东，星巴克可能忽视了劳资纠纷带来的财务和声誉风险。【原文：Starbucks may be neglecting the financial and reputational risks that stem from ​labor disputes, two proxy advisory firms are warning shareholders.】

item.title: 全球股票基金遭遇12月以来最大规模资金外流，因市场担忧油价冲击
item.description: 截至3月11日的七天内，全球股票基金录得自去年12月中旬以来最大单周资金流出，因美以与伊朗持续冲突引发的石油供应中断加剧了市场对通胀和全球经济增长的担忧。【原文：Global equity funds recorded the largest weekly outflows since mid-December in the seven days to March 11 as disruptions to oil supplies stemming from the ongoing U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran ​stoked concerns about inflation and global economic growth.】

item.title: 华尔街期货走势低迷，中东局势动荡加剧通胀担忧；市场静候数据发布
item.description: 美国股市期货周五表现低迷，华尔街主要股指有望连续第三周收跌。中东地区冲突不断升级，可能加剧通胀压力，并使美联储的货币政策制定更为复杂。【原文：U.S. stock index futures were subdued on Friday and Wall Street's main indexes were set for their third week ​in the red, as a widening conflict in the Middle East threatened to stoke price pressures and complicate the Federal Reserve's ‌monetary policymaking.】

item.title: 在战云密布的前景下，沃什在美联储的回旋余地可能正在消失
item.description: 投资者和分析师认为，特朗普总统提名的美联储主席人选凯文·沃什迅速放松货币政策的可能性正在减小。他们已开始推迟预期降息的时间节点，并限制沃什在当前油价冲击持续的情况下，引导同僚降低借贷成本的空间。【原文：Chances for President Donald Trump's Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh to quickly loosen monetary policy are dwindling in the eyes of investors and analysts who have begun pushing back the dates of expected rate cuts and limiting how far they see Warsh being able to steer his colleagues towards lower borrowing costs if an ongoing oil price shock persists.】

item.title: 焦点：信用卡现金返还重塑美国航空公司忠诚度——及利润格局
item.description: 多年来，美国航空公司的命运始终由票价、燃油成本以及客舱载客量所左右。如今，其现金流中越来越大的份额来自联名信用卡业务，这种趋势正日益体现在旅客忠诚度计划的奖励机制中。【原文：For years, the fortunes of U.S. airlines have been dictated by fares, fuel bills and how many passengers fill their cabins. Now, a growing share of their cash comes from co-branded credit cards, and that is increasingly ​showing up in how loyalty programs reward travelers.】

item.title: 特朗普加密货币项目以500万美元提供"保证直接接入"
item.description: 特朗普总统及其儿子们共同创立的加密货币公司World Liberty Financial宣布，投资者若将价值500万美元的代币锁定六个月以换取投票权，即可获得该公司官网所称的"保证直接接触"其特定团队成员的权利。【原文：Investors in World Liberty Financial, the crypto venture co-founded by President Trump and his sons, have secured what the company described on its website as “guaranteed direct access” to certain members of its team for those who lock up $5 million worth ​of their tokens for a six-month period in exchange for voting rights.】

item.title: 英伟达将在大型会议上聚焦超越竞争对手的人工智能技术突破
item.description: 当黄仁勋周一大步走上座无虚席的冰球馆舞台，为英伟达年度开发者大会揭幕时，他很可能将发布一系列产品与合作伙伴关系，旨在帮助这家人工智能芯片制造商在日益激烈的竞争中保持领先地位。【原文：When Jensen Huang strides onto the stage of a packed hockey arena to kick off Nvidia's annual developer conference on Monday, he is likely to ​reveal products and partnerships geared toward keeping the AI chipmaker atop a growing array of competitors.】

item.title: 伊朗战争推高油价，美国农民争相抛售农产品
item.description: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，美国谷物价格持续飙升，促使农民纷纷抛售玉米和大豆——这些作物因去年价格低迷而被囤积至今。【原文：U.S. grain prices have surged since the Iran war began, triggering a flurry of corn and soybean sales by farmers who squirreled away last year's harvests due to weak prices.】

item.title: 华尔街本周展望：投资者静候美联储利率前景，伊朗战争令市场持续承压
item.description: 投资者将在未来一周寻求明确答案，以了解中东冲突在多大程度上扰乱了今年降息的预期，同时他们正为伊朗战争可能引发的市场动荡做好准备。【原文：Investors will seek clarity in the coming week on how much the Middle East conflict is complicating expectations for interest-rate cuts this year, as ​they brace for developments in the Iran war that could rattle markets.】

item.title: 新任塔吉特首席执行官大幅降价。此前降价措施仅带来短暂的销售增长。
item.description: 自上月接任塔吉特首席执行官以来，迈克尔·菲德尔克首次采取重大举措，效仿前任的策略以提振需求：对3000余种商品实施大幅降价。【原文：In his first big move since taking over as Target's CEO last month, Michael Fiddelke took a page out of his predecessor's playbook to shore up demand: slashing prices on more than 3,000 products.】

item.title: 三菱日联金融集团将密切关注日本对美投资热潮中新增贷款的流动性影响
item.description: 三菱日联金融集团高管表示，在发放贷款时将密切关注流动性状况。日本银行正准备为该国在美国5500亿美元投资计划下的项目提供潜在支持。【原文：Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group will closely monitor liquidity ​when issuing loans, an executive said, as ‌Japanese banks prepare to potentially back projects under the country's $550 billion investment package in the United States.】

item.title: 本田157亿美元的电动汽车减记令人痛心，但中国市场挑战正悄然逼近
item.description: 本田对电动汽车业务计提157亿美元减值准备，不仅标志着其美国战略的痛苦逆转，更凸显出来自中国的更多挑战——在技术差距不断扩大的中国市场，本田正面临严峻考验。【原文：Honda's $15.7 billion writedown of its electric vehicle business is not just a painful reversal of its strategy for the U.S.; it also highlights more challenges to come from China, where it faces a widening technological gap.】

item.title: Adobe股价下跌，因首席执行官离职加剧了对人工智能颠覆的担忧
item.description: 在Photoshop开发商Adobe宣布首席执行官尚塔努·纳拉延将卸任后，该公司股价周五盘前暴跌9%。纳拉延已执掌公司18年。这一消息令本就担忧人工智能将颠覆设计软件市场的投资者更加不安。【原文：Adobe's shares plunged 9% in premarket trading on Friday after the Photoshop maker said CEO Shantanu Narayen would step ​down after 18 years at the helm, unsettling investors already ‌wary of AI-driven disruptions to the design software market.】

item.title: 维昂公司核心利润因数字服务增长，正筹备在孟加拉国部署星链项目
item.description: 数字服务运营商Veon周五公布全年核心利润增长约19%，主要得益于数字服务需求上升。该公司正计划将Starlink合作项目扩展至孟加拉国。【原文：Digital services operator Veon ​on Friday reported core profit that was up around 19% for ‌its full year, driven by higher demand for digital services as it looks to expand its Starlink partnership to Bangladesh next.】

item.title: 吉利汽车技术获欧盟辅助驾驶认证
item.description: 中国汽车制造商吉利旗下的智能驾驶辅助系统G-ASD已通过欧盟先进驾驶辅助系统法规认证，标志着中国自主研发的驾驶辅助技术首次在欧盟获得此类认证。【原文：Chinese automaker Geely's ​smart driving assistance ‌system, G-ASD, has received certification ​under EU ​regulations on advanced assisted ⁠driving, marking ​the first approval ​of its kind for China-made driving ​assistance technology ​in the bloc.】

item.title: 中国批准首款脑机接口医疗器械上市，全球首例
item.description: 中国药品监管部门周五宣布，已批准一款能帮助恢复手部运动能力的脑机接口（BCI）系统上市销售，这是全球首例获准商业使用的BCI设备。【原文：China's drug regulator said on Friday that it has given the nod for a brain-computer interface (BCI) system that helps restore ​hand-movement ability to be sold, the world's first approval of ‌a BCI device for commercial use.】

item.title: "梦幻假期"陷入混乱，旅行路线被迫改道，旅客正为伊朗战争买单
item.description: 在西澳大利亚偏远小镇达达努普，会计师娜塔莎·厄尔和她的家人正感受到美以对伊战争带来的经济压力。【原文：In the remote Western Australian town of Dardanup, accountant Natasha Earle and her family are feeling the financial pain of the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran.】

item.title: 分析师重新评估油价预测，因伊朗冲突扰乱市场
item.description: 随着伊朗战争于周五临近两周节点，高盛和美国银行等主要券商已下调了对2026年平均油价的预测。【原文：Major brokerages, including Goldman Sachs and Bank of America, have revised their average oil price forecasts for 2026 ​as the war in Iran approached the two‑week mark ‌on Friday.】

item.title: 中国在巴黎会谈前抨击美国贸易调查
item.description: 中国周五谴责美国针对所谓产能过剩问题展开的贸易调查，并表示保留采取反制措施的权利，这为本周末即将启动的新一轮贸易谈判前景蒙上阴影。【原文：China on Friday rebuked a U.S. trade investigation into alleged overcapacity and said it reserved the right to take countermeasures, clouding the ​outlook for a new round of trade talks that is set ‌to begin this weekend.】

item.title: Adobe长期首席执行官在人工智能颠覆浪潮中卸任，股价下跌
item.description: 设计软件制造商Adobe周四宣布，其长期首席执行官尚塔努·纳拉延将在继任者任命后卸任。受公司战略面临人工智能颠覆的担忧重燃影响，其股价在盘后交易中下跌逾7%。【原文：Adobe's longtime ‌CEO Shantanu Narayen will leave his role once a successor is appointed, the design software maker said on Thursday, sending its shares down over 7% in extended trading on renewed worries around its strategy as it grapples with AI disruption.】

item.title: 针对数据中心的反扑浪潮正蔓延至法国市政选举竞选活动
item.description: 在巴黎郊外的勒布尔热镇，法国市政选举候选人索菲安·米卢斯誓言要推翻一项数据中心建设计划。他指出该项目将加剧热岛效应、恶化噪音污染，且几乎不会创造本地就业岗位。【原文：In the town of Le Bourget outside Paris, Sofiane Milous, a candidate in France's municipal elections, is vowing to reverse ​plans for a data centre he says will intensify heat islands, worsen noise pollution and create few local jobs.】

item.title: 越南对美贸易顺差创历史新高，1月数据显示
item.description: 最新美国官方数据显示，越南1月份对美贸易顺差规模位居首位，超越墨西哥和中国。该国出口额大幅增长，而中国对美直接出口则出现下滑。【原文：Vietnam produced the largest trade surplus with the United States in January, overtaking both Mexico and China, latest official U.S. data shows, as its ​exports rose sharply while Chinese direct shipments to the United States ‌fell.】

item.title: 高盛将3月布伦特原油均价预测上调至每桶100美元以上
item.description: 高盛周五表示，预计布伦特原油3月均价将超过每桶100美元，4月为85美元。由于伊朗战争、中东能源基础设施受损以及霍尔木兹海峡中断，能源价格仍将持续波动。【原文：Goldman Sachs ​expects Brent oil to average over $100 a barrel ‌in March, and $85 in April, it said on Friday, as energy prices remain volatile due to the Iran war and damage ​to Middle East energy infrastructure and disruptions in ​the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 意法半导体计划部署机器人并实施员工再培训以避免工厂关闭
item.description: 意法半导体周四宣布计划，将在其老旧芯片制造工厂实施员工再培训并部署机器人，以避免工厂关闭。这家欧洲半导体巨头正积极应对行业挑战。【原文：STMicroelectronics unveiled ​plans on Thursday to retrain workers and deploy robots in its ‌older chip manufacturing plants, avoiding closures as the European semiconductor giant navigates industry challenges.】

item.title: 独家：ABB董事长称公司正重启并购计划，或将达成"不止一笔"重大交易
item.description: ABB董事长彼得·沃瑟向路透社表示，该公司正加速推进收购计划，并准备推进多项价值数十亿美元的交易。这家瑞士工程集团在经历多年资产剥离后，正寻求加快增长步伐。【原文：ABB is stepping up its acquisition drive and is open to pursuing ​more than one multi-billion dollar transaction, Chairman Peter Voser told Reuters, as the Swiss engineering group looks to speed up ‌growth after years of divestments.】

item.title: 早盘竞价：原油震荡
item.description: 安库尔·班纳吉带您展望欧洲及全球市场今日走势【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Ankur Banerjee】

item.title: 大众汽车瞄准中国市场复苏，首款与小鹏汽车合作车型启动量产
item.description: 大众汽车周五表示，已开始量产其与中国电动汽车制造商小鹏汽车联合开发的首次合作车型。这家德国汽车制造商计划今年在中国推出20余款新车型，力图重振中国市场。【原文：Volkswagen said on Friday it has begun mass production of its first model developed jointly with Chinese EV maker Xpeng , as the German ​carmaker targets a comeback in China with more than 20 new models ‌to be launched this year.】
